title: Any sufficiently cleared token in a tenant can unseal another subject's owner-bound envelope

affected_locations.label: owner_binding
affected_locations.detail: owner is authenticated context at seal

affected_locations.label: broken_authorization
affected_locations.detail: owner is omitted from unseal checks

evidence: equal tenant and adequate classification satisfy every branch at wsf-seal/src/lib.rs:389-422 despite differing subject_hash
owner_subject_hash has no read in unseal
Transit key selection at 428 is tenant-only
proof_gap: Dynamic OpenBao-backed two-subject test was not run; authorization omission is exact.

facts: same-tenant attacker has valid token and victim envelope
open_envelope authenticates the victim envelope and returns its plaintext
